command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute 
-- 修复所有城市的合同状态：从 terminated 改为 active
UPDATE partner_cities SET contractStatus = 'active' WHERE contractStatus = 'terminated';

-- 修复所有城市的当前分红阶段：从 3 改为 1
UPDATE partner_cities SET currentProfitStage = 1 WHERE currentProfitStage = 3;

-- 修复福州和泉州的品牌使用费：从 0 改为 50000
UPDATE partner_cities pc
JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
SET pc.brandUsageFee = 50000
WHERE c.name IN ('福州', '泉州') AND pc.brandUsageFee = 0;
